notes: near inlet - boundary layer developing rapidly

x_m: Numerical: 2D FD on 120x30 grid explicit forward Euler upwind convection central diffusion
BC at membrane: dC/dy|0 = J*C/D (concentration polarisation boundary condition)
CP factor = 1.49 means membrane surface sees 49% more salt than bulk
Effective osmotic pressure at membrane face = 28.4 * 1.49 = 42.3 bar
This is safely below operating pressure of 60 bar giving NDP = 17.7 bar
